arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man Utd & Chelsea Must All Target ‘Ridiculous Talent’ After Most Recent Display
arts.sum: Ipswich Town star Liam Delap has reaffirmed his credentials with another goal amid rumours of a move to a Premier League 'big six' club.

arts.ttl: Man United 'not alone in their admiration' of £59.5m-rated RB Leipzig star as Premier League rivals are 'revealed'
arts.sum: Manchester United will allegedly face competition from Premier League rivals Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool for RB Leipzig attacker Xavi Simons.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: QUICK Osimhen deal, Arsenal Zubimendi HIJACK, De Bruyne to Saudi
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: QUICK Osimhen deal, Arsenal Zubimendi HIJACK, De Bruyne to Saudi Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Victor Osimhen, Martin Zubimendi and Kevin de Bruyne .

arts.ttl: Man United forward Alejandro Garnacho's house decision 'explained' with youngster's future under the microscope
arts.sum: Manchester United attacker Alejandro Garnacho is allegedly planning to sell his property in Cheshire as he wants to downsize.

arts.ttl: Manchester United’s scouts have taken notice of player – ‘Fairly low costs’ make him ideal option
arts.sum: Manchester United’s Italian scouts have taken notice of Udinese striker Lorenzo Lucca, and he is a name to keep an eye on moving forwards. That’s according to Sportmediaset, who report that Manchester United have joined the big sides in Italy in watching the 24-year-old. Lucca has been earning a growing list of admirers this season The post Manchester United’s scouts have taken notice of player – ‘Fairly low costs’ make him ideal option appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne's net worth, wife he met in Twitter DMs, who he could join post Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City superstar Kevin De Bruyne will leave the club - and likely the Premier League - at the end of the season following 10 trophy-laden seasons at the Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: The fall of Manchester? Manchester City & Manchester United heading for worst ever combined PL points total
arts.sum: London might be the capital of England, but in recent decades it's the Northern city of Manchester that has been the most dominant in the Premier League era. A city famous for it's music, culture...

arts.ttl: Analysis: Marmoush can step up and shine in Haaland's absence
arts.sum: All eyes will be on how Marmoush handles the occasion, as attempts to fill the void left by Haaland, who has scored six goals in eight appearances against Manchester United . Currently scoring top-fight goals at a faster rate than Haaland, the only two current Premier League players ahead of him for this statistic are Mohamed Salah and Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: I'm Man City's newest hero – but I could've joined Liverpool or Man United instead
arts.sum: Young Manchester City midfielder Nico O'Reilly has been one of the club's brightest stars this season but he could have easily found himself playing for one of City's Premier League rivals

arts.ttl: Scott McTominay shows true colours as he comments on Man Utd transfer policy
arts.sum: Scott McTominay, now of Napoli, has reflected on his time at Manchester United and how he always felt the need to prove himself following high-profile arrivals
